column4: Orion Logistics LLC - Amazon Delivery Service Partner
column86: We are a delivery service partner of Amazon Logistics - we were abruptly cut routes two days after Christmas. Our DSP has had fantastic stats and during our time at DDV5, have never dropped a route. The expectation was to be at 80 routes - roughly 164 drivers. Then without significant or clear warning dropped and have continued to do so over the last few months. I have been in this industry for 2.5 years and a cut this massive has never happened before but it is happening to all the DSPs in our station. We are currently down to 21 routes and expected to be at 20 starting next week.
